flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hamline University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (57.8% → 50.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Hamline University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (57.7% vs 66.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hamline University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
